framework.name: Regulatory vs Bureaucratic Process Constraints
framework.description: Fortune author notes Mollick's process-abandonment thesis underestimates extent to which enterprise processes reflect regulatory demands rather than pure bureaucracy, particularly in regulated industries.
framework.raw_quote: I think Mollick underestimates the extent to which processes in many large companies reflect regulatory demands, but he no doubt has a point in many cases.

source.title: An MIT report finding 95% of AI pilots fail spooked investors. It should have spooked C-suite execs instead. | Fortune
